slides.title: Agents and MCPs in AI: the practical map
points: AI agents plan and act in loops, not just generate text
MCPs standardise how agents connect to tools and context
Together they make AI systems extensible, testable, and auditable
This deck covers architecture, risks, and a rollout path

slides.title: What an AI Agent is (and what it isn't)
points: Agents follow a perceive â†’ plan â†’ act â†’ observe cycle
They can choose actions, but responsibility stays with your organisation
Good agents use tools with constraints, not free-form guesses
Measure outcomes: time saved, fewer errors, higher throughput

slides.title: What MCP is: Model Context Protocol
points: MCP is a standard to connect models to tools and data sources
It separates the client/agent from the context/tool servers
Typed interfaces reduce brittle, one-off integrations
You get consistent tool access across workflows

slides.title: How agents use MCPs in production
points: Discover: list available MCP tools and capabilities
Request: fetch only the context required for the task
Call: execute tools with validated inputs and outputs
Observe: log decisions and route exceptions for review when needed

slides.title: Common failure modes (and fixes)
points: Tool mismatch: enforce allowlists and strict schemas
Stale context: add freshness rules and explicit retrieval steps
Unsafe actions: require approvals for high-risk operations
No observability: instrument tool calls, outcomes, and drift signals

slides.title: Use cases that fit MCP + agents
points: Support agents: knowledge retrieval plus safe ticket actions
Operations agents: doc search and workflow updates across systems
Analytics agents: controlled SQL/BI queries with guardrails
Onboarding agents: policy retrieval and guided step completion

slides.title: Rollout checklist: pilot to reliable value
points: Pick one high-impact workflow with a clear before/after KPI
Define tool contracts early (schemas, limits, confidence thresholds)
Monitor from day one (tool calls, outcomes, exceptions)
Scale only when governance and adoption are working
